    Small models (<=300B params) detected: - nvidia/qwen/qwen3-next-80b-a3b-instruct (80B) @ agents.defaults.model.fallbacks (unsafe; sandbox=off; web=[web_fetch, …
    Fix: If you must use small models, enable sandboxing for all sessions (agents.defaults.sandbox.mode="all") and disable web_search/web_fetch/browser (tools.deny=["group:web","browser"]).
  WARN Reverse proxy headers are not trusted
    gateway.bind is loopback and gateway.trustedProxies is empty. If you expose the Control UI through a reverse proxy, configure trusted proxies so local-client c…
    Fix: Set gateway.trustedProxies to your proxy IPs or keep the Control UI local-only.
  WARN Extensions exist but plugins.allow is not set
    Found 4 extension(s) under /Users/puddy/.openclaw/extensions. Without plugins.allow, any discovered plugin id may load (depending on config and plugin behavior…
    Fix: Set plugins.allow to an explicit list of plugin ids you trust.

---

**每日系统健康检查报告**

**检查时间**: 2026-02-27 05:00 AM (America/New_York)

---

**1. OpenClaw 状态** ✅ 正常

- 版本: 2026.2.26 (npm 有更新可用)
- 运行状态: 活跃
- 插件加载: 正常 (context-warning, heartbeat-file, memory-tfidf, simple-cron)
- Feishu 集成: 已配置，状态正常
- 活跃会话: 8 个 (含当前 cron 任务)
- 主会话: 9 分钟前活跃，模型 k2p5，上下文 72k/262k (27%)

---

**2. Gateway 运行状态** ✅ 正常

- 服务状态: 运行中 (pid 79349)
- 绑定地址: 127.0.0.1:18789 (仅本地访问)
- RPC 探测: 正常
- 日志文件: /tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-02-27.log
- 启动方式: LaunchAgent (macOS 服务)

---

**3. Workspace 目录状态** ✅ 正常

- 文件总数: 83 个
- 内存日志: 14 个文件 (memory/ 目录)
- 最新备份: 2026-02-27 04:23
- 关键文件: AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, MEMORY.md, USER.md 均存在且正常

---

**4. 磁盘空间** ✅ 正常

- 主磁盘: 100Gi 总容量
- 已使用: 40Gi (58%)
- 可用空间: 29Gi

---

**总结**: 系统整体健康，所有组件运行正常。唯一提示：OpenClaw 有更新版本可用 (2026.2.26)。
